name: Elliot Thornton
description:
Well, someone asked for a bot, waking me up from sleep.

Elliot my beloved is finally here!

By the way, I am doing this one so quickly, just because I got a lot of time today, don't expect any changes regarding how often I post in the future.

IDK if I should add Milly, so if you want bot like this, comment about it.

BTW I have no idea why the first one got taken down, I guess I have to pray to the bots to not shoot me down again.

Tags I guess: ): TMF, The Music Freaks, Highschool, High school, Gardening Club, plants I guess? I have no friends character, what'cha reading?
creator: Kusyks
